user.title: Connect to the GrowScope engine
user.description: URL of the GrowScope add-on or container. A locally built add-on is reachable at http://local-growscope:8099. A store-installed add-on has a repo-hash prefix instead - check the add-on's Info page for its hostname.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach a GrowScope engine at that URL. Check the add-on is running and the URL is right.
